long_description:
NRE were alerted of link between fas08a.sr02.ams03 Et3/1 <-> fcs142a.sr02.ams03 Et49/1 going down. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19681
short_description: fas08a.sr02.ams03 Et3/1 <-> fcs142a.sr02.ams03 Et49/1 | Link Down
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via automation.)
